title: Mythic Muskets & Valkyrie Sails
description:
Steel, Lead, and the Open Sky.
Experience a unique blend of medieval fantasy and tactical ballistics. Mythic Muskets & Valkyrie Sails is a high-performance Fabric modpack that redefines exploration and combat.
body:
Mythic Muskets & Valkyrie Sails
Where Medieval Valor Meets Ballistic Innovation
Embark on an epic journey where the steel of a sword is no longer your only defense. Mythic Muskets & Valkyrie Sails is a curated Fabric modpack that blends the rugged, atmospheric exploration of Valheim with the high-stakes adrenaline of modern tactical ballistics.

### Key Features
### Engineering the Skies & Seas
Utilize the power of Eureka! to transform your medieval builds into functional mobile bases. Build massive galleons to conquer the oceans or steam-powered airships to sail above the clouds.

### Tactical Medieval Combat
Forget basic bows. With TacZ (Timeless and Classics Zero), experience high-quality, smooth firearm mechanics. From flintlock-style rifles to advanced tactical gear, your arsenal is as deadly as it is diverse.

### A Valheim-Inspired World
Explore a world designed with a focus on progression, discovery, and atmospheric beauty. The landscape is unforgiving, and the monsters are relentless—luckily, you have the firepower to fight back.

### Fabric Optimized
Built on the Fabric loader for peak performance, ensuring high frame rates and smooth gameplay even when your massive airship is firing a broadside.

"The age of simple knights is over. Build your ship, load your rifle, and claim your legend."
